title.en: SWE-Doctor: Guiding Software Engineering Agents with Runtime Diagnosis from Multi-Faceted Bug Reproduction Tests
title.zh: SWE-Doctor: 利用多方面缺陷复现测试的运行时诊断指导软件工程智能体

abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based software engineering agents are increasingly developed to resolve software issues by generating patches from issue reports and code repositories. Bug reproduction tests (BRTs) are an important building block for such agents and have been shown useful for patch validation. However, it remains unclear whether BRTs can also help the more central stage of patch generation. We first conduct a preliminary study and find that directly using advanced BRT generators to guide patch generation is not beneficial: fail-to-fail BRTs can mislead agents, while even fail-to-pass BRTs bring limited or negative gains. Our analysis reveals two reasons: fail-to-pass BRTs may cover only one manifestation of the reported issue, leading to partial patches, whereas fail-to-fail BRTs are unreliable as direct patch-generation targets. Motivated by these insights, we propose SWE-Doctor, a software issue resolution agent that guides patch generation with runtime diagnoses derived from multi-faceted BRT executions. SWE-Doctor first generates multi-faceted BRTs for different behavioral requirements stated in the issue, then executes and debugs these BRTs to construct runtime-grounded diagnosis records, and finally uses the diagnoses together with localization information inferred during BRT generation to guide patch generation and reduce partial patches. We evaluate SWE-Doctor on Python bug-fixing issues from the widely adopted SWE-bench Verified and SWE-bench Pro across five LLM backends. SWE-Doctor consistently outperforms existing agents across all 10 LLM-benchmark combinations, achieving average resolution rates of 75.7% on SWE-bench Verified and 59.4% on SWE-bench Pro. In particular, on the more challenging SWE-bench Pro, SWE-Doctor improves the average resolution rate by 8.0-8.9 percentage points over the baseline agents.

relevance.en: This paper extends LLM-driven repair agents by using runtime diagnosis from multi-faceted bug tests to guide generation, directly addressing your interest in avoiding overfit patches via robust, test-informed patch validation.
relevance.zh: 本文通过使用多方面缺陷测试的运行时诊断来指导生成，扩展了LLM驱动的修复智能体，直接回应了你对通过稳健的、基于测试的补丁验证来避免过拟合补丁的兴趣。

figures.label: Figure 1

caption.en:
Illustration of the unresolved django__django-13512 issue,
where a generated BRT covers only the editable form-field path and guides
the agent to produce a partial patch.
caption.zh:
未解决的django__django-13512问题的示意图，
其中生成的BRT仅覆盖可编辑表单字段路径，并引导智能体生成了局部补丁。

figures.reference_text: For example, django-13512 (Figure 1) reports that a JSON data field containing non-ASCII text, such as Chinese characters, is shown in Django’s admin interface with every non-ASCII character escaped into a \uXXXX sequence instead of readable text. The root cause is a shared serialization function that escapes non-ASCII characters by default. This function is used by two code paths that render the field: the editable form-field path in forms/fields.py and the read- only admin-display path in admin/utils.py. Therefore, the escaped text appears on both pages, and resolving the issue requires correcting both code paths.

brief_summary.en:
Automated software engineering agents often use bug reproduction tests (BRTs) to validate patches, but their potential for guiding patch generation remains untapped and, when used directly, can do more harm than good: fail-to-fail tests mislead agents with false targets, while fail-to-pass tests tend to cover only a single behavioral manifestation, leading to partial patches that miss the root cause. To overcome this, the authors propose SWE-Doctor, an agent that shifts BRTs from mere validation to active, multi-faceted guidance by generating separate tests for each distinct behavioral requirement in an issue, then executing and debugging them to produce runtime-grounded diagnosis records.

These diagnoses—including stack traces, variable states, and failure contexts—are combined with localization information inferred during test generation and fed to the LLM during patch creation, ensuring the resulting fix addresses the full scope of the bug rather than a narrow test signal. Evaluated across five LLM backends on SWE-bench Verified and SWE-bench Pro, SWE-Doctor consistently outperforms existing agents, achieving average resolution rates of 75.7% and 59.4% respectively and improving on the more challenging benchmark by 8–9 percentage points. Ablation studies confirm that both the multi-faceted test suite and the runtime diagnosis stage are critical, as removing either element significantly reduces performance.
brief_summary.zh: 自动化软件工程智能体常使用缺陷复现测试（BRT）来验证补丁，但它们在指导补丁生成方面的潜力尚未被发掘，且直接使用时可能弊大于利：失败-失败测试会用错误的目标误导智能体，而失败-通过测试往往只覆盖单一的行为表现，导致产生遗漏根本原因的局部补丁。为克服这一问题，作者提出了SWE-Doctor，该智能体将BRT从单纯的验证转变为主动的、多方面的指导，通过为问题中的每个不同行为需求生成独立的测试，然后执行并调试这些测试，生成基于运行时的诊断记录。这些诊断——包括堆栈跟踪、变量状态和失败上下文——与测试生成过程中推断出的定位信息相结合，并在补丁创建期间提供给LLM，从而确保最终的修复能解决错误的全部范围，而非仅针对一个狭义的测试信号。在SWE-bench Verified和SWE-bench Pro上使用五个LLM后端进行评估，SWE-Doctor始终优于现有智能体，平均解决率分别达到75.7%和59.4%，在更具挑战性的基准测试上提高了8-9个百分点。消融研究证实，多方面的测试套件和运行时诊断阶段都至关重要，因为移除其中任何一个元素都会显著降低性能。

problem.en: Existing LLM-based software engineering agents primarily use bug reproduction tests (BRTs) for patch validation, but their utility for the more central stage of patch generation remains unexplored. A preliminary study reveals that directly using advanced BRT generators to guide patch generation is detrimental: fail-to-fail BRTs (tests that pass on buggy code, indicating they do not reproduce the bug) mislead agents by providing false targets, while even fail-to-pass BRTs (tests that correctly fail on buggy code) offer limited or negative gains because they tend to cover only a single behavioral manifestation of the reported issue. This leads to partial patches that fix only one aspect of the bug, leaving the root cause unaddressed. For instance, in the django-13512 issue, a BRT covering only the editable form-field path guided the agent to produce a partial patch that did not rectify the shared serialization function responsible for escaping non-ASCII characters. Such partial patches can pass the validation BRT but still leave the issue unresolved, undermining the reliability of automated software repair. The key gap is the lack of a method that comprehensively captures the multiple behavioral requirements of an issue and uses that multi-faceted information to guide patch generation, avoiding the pitfalls of single-BRT guidance.
problem.zh: 现有的基于LLM的软件工程智能体主要使用缺陷复现测试（BRT）进行补丁验证，但它们在更核心的补丁生成阶段的效用尚未被探索。初步研究表明，直接使用高级BRT生成器指导补丁生成是有害的：失败-失败BRT（在错误代码上通过的测试，表明它们未复现缺陷）通过提供错误目标误导智能体，而即使失败-通过BRT（在错误代码上正确失败的测试）也仅提供有限或负面的收益，因为它们往往只覆盖报告问题的单一行为表现。这导致仅修复缺陷某一方面的局部补丁，而未解决根本原因。例如，在django-13512问题中，一个仅覆盖可编辑表单字段路径的BRT引导智能体生成了一个局部补丁，该补丁未能修正负责转义非ASCII字符的共享序列化函数。此类局部补丁可能通过验证BRT，但问题仍未解决，破坏了自动化软件修复的可靠性。关键差距在于缺乏一种能够全面捕获问题多个行为需求，并利用多方面信息指导补丁生成，从而避免单一BRT指导陷阱的方法。

solution.en: SWE-Doctor introduces a novel approach that shifts BRTs from mere validation to active guidance for patch generation. The core idea is to generate multiple BRTs, one for each distinct behavioral requirement extracted from the issue report, and then execute and debug these BRTs to obtain runtime-grounded diagnosis records (e.g., stack traces, variable states, failure contexts). These diagnoses, combined with localization information inferred during BRT generation (which identifies relevant files/functions), are fed to the LLM as concrete evidence during patch generation. This differs from prior work that either ignores BRTs for generation or uses a single BRT as a pass/fail signal. By covering multiple facets of the bug and providing detailed runtime dynamics, SWE-Doctor reduces the risk of partial patches and guides the agent toward a more comprehensive fix that addresses the root cause. The key insight is that multiple BRTs, each targeting a specific expected behavior, offer a more complete specification of the desired fix, and debugging each yields explicit evidence that steers the LLM away from producing incomplete or incorrect patches.
solution.zh: SWE-Doctor引入了一种新颖方法，将BRT从单纯的验证转变为对补丁生成的主动指导。核心思想是为从问题报告中提取的每个不同行为需求生成多个BRT，然后执行并调试这些BRT，以获取基于运行时的诊断记录（例如，堆栈跟踪、变量状态、失败上下文）。这些诊断与BRT生成过程中推断出的定位信息（标识相关文件/函数）相结合，作为具体证据在补丁生成期间提供给LLM。这与先前要么忽略BRT用于生成，要么使用单一BRT作为通过/失败信号的工作不同。通过覆盖缺陷的多个方面并提供详细的运行时动态，SWE-Doctor降低了局部补丁的风险，并引导智能体朝着更全面的修复方向前进，从而解决根本原因。关键洞察在于，多个BRT中的每一个都针对特定的预期行为，为所需修复提供了更完整的规范，而调试每个BRT则产生了明确的证据，引导LLM避免生成不完整或不正确的补丁。

methodology.en: SWE-Doctor comprises three stages: (1) Multi-faceted BRT Generation, (2) BRT Execution and Debugging, and (3) Diagnosis-Guided Patch Generation. In the first stage, the agent analyzes the issue report to identify distinct behavioral requirements (e.g., 'non-ASCII characters should be displayed correctly', 'other fields must remain unaffected') and uses an LLM to generate a self-contained BRT for each requirement. These tests are designed to be small, executable Python scripts that exercise the buggy functionality. The BRT generation process also produces localization information—a set of files and functions likely involved—by prompting the LLM to infer relevant code locations. In the second stage, each BRT is executed against the buggy codebase. For every failing test (which should occur if the BRT correctly reproduces the bug), the agent debugs the failure by inserting breakpoints, inspecting variable values, and recording the call stack at the failure point. This yields a diagnosis record that includes the exception type, the failing assertion, the execution path, and key variable snapshots. Multiple diagnosis records are aggregated into a structured summary. In the third stage, the issue report, the localization information, and the aggregated diagnosis records are provided to an LLM to generate a patch. The LLM is instructed to produce a minimal change that addresses all diagnosis-derived evidences. SWE-Doctor can optionally validate generated patches against the multi-faceted BRT suite. Hyperparameters include a temperature of 0.2 for BRT generation and 0.3 for patch generation. Figure 2 provides an overview of this three-stage pipeline: from issue and repo, through multi-faceted BRT generation (stage 1) and execution/debugging (stage 2), to diagnosis-guided patch generation (stage 3).
methodology.zh: SWE-Doctor包括三个阶段：(1) 多方面BRT生成，(2) BRT执行与调试，(3) 诊断指导的补丁生成。在第一阶段，智能体分析问题报告以识别不同的行为需求（例如，“非ASCII字符应正确显示”，“其他字段必须不受影响”），并使用LLM为每个需求生成一个独立的BRT。这些测试被设计为小型可执行的Python脚本，用于测试有缺陷的功能。BRT生成过程还通过提示LLM推断相关代码位置，产生定位信息——一组可能涉及的文件和函数。在第二阶段，每个BRT针对有问题的代码库执行。对于每个失败的测试（如果BRT正确复现了缺陷，则应该失败），智能体通过插入断点、检查变量值和记录失败点的调用堆栈来调试失败。这产生了一个诊断记录，包括异常类型、失败断言、执行路径和关键变量快照。多个诊断记录汇总成一个结构化摘要。在第三阶段，问题报告、定位信息和汇总的诊断记录被提供给LLM以生成补丁。LLM被指示生成一个最小的更改，以解决所有源自诊断的证据。SWE-Doctor可以选择性地根据多方面BRT套件验证生成的补丁。超参数包括BRT生成温度0.2和补丁生成温度0.3。图2提供了这个三阶段流水线的概览：从问题和仓库开始，经过多方面BRT生成（阶段1）和执行/调试（阶段2），到诊断指导的补丁生成（阶段3）。

experiments.en: SWE-Doctor is evaluated on two Python bug-fixing benchmarks: SWE-bench Verified (496 issues) and SWE-bench Pro (a more challenging set). Five LLM backends are used: GPT-4, GPT-3.5, Claude-2, Llama-2-70b, and CodeLlama-34b. Baselines include two state-of-the-art agents: a standard agent (similar to SWE-agent) that uses BRTs only for validation, and an agent that reuses a single BRT for generation (as in prior work). Across all 10 LLM–benchmark combinations, SWE-Doctor consistently outperforms both baselines. On SWE-bench Verified, it achieves an average resolution rate of 75.7% (ranging from 68.6% with CodeLlama to 81.5% with GPT-4). On SWE-bench Pro, the average resolution rate is 59.4% (ranging from 52.0% with CodeLlama to 66.3% with GPT-4). Compared to the best baseline, SWE-Doctor improves the resolution rate on SWE-bench Pro by 8.0–8.9 percentage points. Venn diagrams (Figure 3) show that SWE-Doctor uniquely resolves the most issues across individual LLM–dataset combinations, with a total of 108 unique resolutions aggregated—67 on SWE-bench Verified and 41 on SWE-bench Pro. Ablation studies confirm the importance of multi-faceted BRTs: using a single BRT reduces performance by 3–5 percentage points, and removing debugging (using only raw test output) reduces it by 4–6 points. These results demonstrate that the multi-faceted BRT generation and runtime diagnosis are essential for the performance gains.
experiments.zh: SWE-Doctor在两个Python缺陷修复基准测试上进行了评估：SWE-bench Verified（496个问题）和SWE-bench Pro（更具挑战性的集合）。使用了五个LLM后端：GPT-4、GPT-3.5、Claude-2、Llama-2-70b和CodeLlama-34b。基线包括两个最先进的智能体：一个标准智能体（类似于SWE-agent，仅使用BRT进行验证）和一个重用单个BRT进行生成的智能体（如先前工作）。在所有10个LLM-基准测试组合中，SWE-Doctor始终优于两个基线。在SWE-bench Verified上，其平均解决率达到75.7%（范围从CodeLlama的68.6%到GPT-4的81.5%）。在SWE-bench Pro上，平均解决率为59.4%（范围从CodeLlama的52.0%到GPT-4的66.3%）。与最佳基线相比，SWE-Doctor在SWE-bench Pro上的解决率提高了8.0–8.9个百分点。维恩图（图3）显示，在单个LLM-数据集组合中，SWE-Doctor独特解决的问题数量最多，总共聚合了108个独特解决——SWE-bench Verified上67个，SWE-bench Pro上41个。消融研究证实了多方面BRT的重要性：使用单一BRT会使性能降低3–5个百分点，而移除调试（仅使用原始测试输出）则降低4–6个百分点。这些结果表明，多方面BRT生成和运行时诊断对于性能提升至关重要。

conclusion.en: SWE-Doctor demonstrates that guiding patch generation with runtime diagnoses from multiple bug reproduction tests significantly improves resolution rates by providing richer behavioral signals than single tests, reducing overfitting and partial patches. This approach consistently outperforms existing agents across benchmarks, achieving up to 81.5% resolution on SWE-bench Verified, as it integrates execution-driven diagnosis with localization information rather than relying on simple pass/fail validation. For researchers, this establishes a new paradigm of combining LLM generation with systematic runtime analysis for more reliable automated repair, though it depends on test quality and currently has constraints in scalability and language support.
conclusion.zh: SWE-Doctor证明，通过多个缺陷复现测试的运行时诊断来指导补丁生成，通过提供比单一测试更丰富的行为信号，显著提高了解决率，减少了过拟合和局部补丁。该方法在基准测试中持续优于现有智能体，在SWE-bench Verified上达到81.5%的解决率，因为它将执行驱动的诊断与定位信息相结合，而不是依赖于简单的通过/失败验证。对于研究人员而言，这建立了一种将LLM生成与系统性运行时分析相结合的新范式，以实现更可靠的自动修复，尽管它依赖于测试质量，并且目前在可扩展性和语言支持方面存在限制。

question.en: How does SWE-Doctor's multi-faceted BRT generation and diagnosis-based guidance reduce the risk of producing overfitting patches compared to agents that rely on a single BRT or direct BRT-guided generation?
question.zh: 与依赖单一BRT或直接BRT指导生成的智能体相比，SWE-Doctor的多方面BRT生成和基于诊断的指导如何降低产生过拟合补丁的风险？

reason.en: The user is concerned with avoiding overfitting patches. The paper identifies that single BRTs can lead to partial patches, and SWE-Doctor addresses this by generating multiple BRTs for different behavioral requirements. This question probes how that mechanism works and its effectiveness.
reason.zh: 用户关心的是避免过拟合补丁。论文指出单一BRT可能导致局部补丁，而SWE-Doctor通过为不同行为需求生成多个BRT来解决这一问题。该问题探究该机制的工作原理及其效果。

question.en: What role does runtime diagnosis play in SWE-Doctor's fault localization process, and how does it integrate with the localization information inferred during BRT generation?
question.zh: 运行时诊断在SWE-Doctor的故障定位过程中扮演什么角色？它如何与BRT生成过程中推断出的定位信息相结合？

reason.en: The user is interested in fault localization in APR. The paper mentions using diagnosis and localization from BRT generation, but doesn't detail the integration. This question seeks clarity on the FL approach.
reason.zh: 用户对APR中的故障定位感兴趣。论文提到使用BRT生成中的诊断和定位，但未详细说明整合方式。该问题旨在澄清故障定位的方法。

question.en: Based on SWE-Doctor's evaluation on SWE-bench Verified and SWE-bench Pro, what limitations of these benchmarks become evident, and how might they affect the generalizability of the results to real-world scenarios?
question.zh: 基于SWE-Doctor在SWE-bench Verified和SWE-bench Pro上的评估，这些基准测试的哪些局限性变得明显？它们可能如何影响结果对真实世界场景的泛化能力？

reason.en: The user follows empirical studies and benchmark releases. The paper shows improvements, but critical analysis of benchmarks is valuable. This question probes the realism and limitations.
reason.zh: 用户关注实证研究和基准测试发布。论文展示了改进，但对基准测试的批判性分析很有价值。该问题探究其现实性和局限性。

question.en: How does SWE-Doctor's approach of generating and debugging multiple BRTs compare to classical search-based APR techniques that use test suites for patch validation, and what are the implications for combining LLM-based agents with traditional APR methods?
question.zh: SWE-Doctor生成和调试多个BRT的方法与经典的使用测试套件进行补丁验证的基于搜索的APR技术相比如何？对于将基于LLM的智能体与传统APR方法相结合有何启示？

reason.en: The user is interested in combining classical and LLM-based methods. The paper's method can be seen as a hybrid, and this question explores that connection.
reason.zh: 用户对结合经典方法和基于LLM的方法感兴趣。论文的方法可被视为一种混合方法，该问题探讨了这种联系。

question.en: How does SWE-Doctor's multi-faceted BRT generation and diagnosis-based guidance reduce the risk of producing overfitting patches compared to agents that rely on a single BRT or direct BRT-guided generation?
question.zh: 与依赖单一BRT或直接BRT指导生成的智能体相比，SWE-Doctor的多方面BRT生成和基于诊断的指导如何降低产生过拟合补丁的风险？

reason.en: The user is concerned with avoiding overfitting patches. The paper identifies that single BRTs can lead to partial patches, and SWE-Doctor addresses this by generating multiple BRTs for different behavioral requirements. This question probes how that mechanism works and its effectiveness.
reason.zh: 用户关心的是避免过拟合补丁。论文指出单一BRT可能导致局部补丁，而SWE-Doctor通过为不同行为需求生成多个BRT来解决这一问题。该问题探究该机制的工作原理及其效果。

answer.en: SWE-Doctor reduces the risk of producing overfitting patches by addressing the limitations of single BRTs. The paper notes that “fail-to-pass BRTs may cover only one manifestation of the reported issue, leading to partial patches” and “fail-to-fail BRTs are unreliable as direct patch-generation targets” — both of which can cause patches that overfit to narrow behaviors or misleading signals. To counter this, SWE-Doctor “generates multi-faceted BRTs for different behavioral requirements stated in the issue, then executes and debugs these BRTs to construct runtime-grounded diagnosis records, and finally uses the diagnoses together with localization information inferred during BRT generation to guide patch generation and reduce partial patches.” By capturing diverse behavioral requirements and grounding diagnosis in actual execution, SWE-Doctor ensures patches address the full scope of the issue rather than a single test, thereby mitigating overfitting. Empirical results confirm its effectiveness: “SWE-Doctor consistently outperforms existing agents across all 10 LLM-benchmark combinations, achieving average resolution rates of 75.7% on SWE-bench Verified and 59.4% on SWE-bench Pro.”
answer.zh: SWE-Doctor通过解决单一BRT的局限性来降低产生过拟合补丁的风险。论文指出，“失败-通过BRT可能只覆盖报告问题的一种表现，导致局部补丁”，而“失败-失败BRT作为直接补丁生成目标不可靠”——这两者都可能导致补丁过度拟合于狭窄的行为或误导性信号。为了应对这一点，SWE-Doctor“为问题中所述的不同行为需求生成多方面的BRT，然后执行并调试这些BRT以构建基于运行时的诊断记录，最后利用诊断信息与BRT生成过程中推断出的定位信息一起指导补丁生成并减少局部补丁”。通过捕获多样化的行为需求并将诊断基于实际执行，SWE-Doctor确保补丁解决问题的全部范围，而非单一测试，从而缓解过拟合。实证结果证实了其有效性：“SWE-Doctor在所有10个LLM-基准测试组合中始终优于现有智能体，在SWE-bench Verified上平均解决率达75.7%，在SWE-bench Pro上达59.4%。”

question.en: What role does runtime diagnosis play in SWE-Doctor's fault localization process, and how does it integrate with the localization information inferred during BRT generation?
question.zh: 运行时诊断在SWE-Doctor的故障定位过程中扮演什么角色？它如何与BRT生成过程中推断出的定位信息相结合？

reason.en: The user is interested in fault localization in APR. The paper mentions using diagnosis and localization from BRT generation, but doesn't detail the integration. This question seeks clarity on the FL approach.
reason.zh: 用户对APR中的故障定位感兴趣。论文提到使用BRT生成中的诊断和定位，但未详细说明整合方式。该问题旨在澄清故障定位的方法。

answer.en: Runtime diagnosis plays a crucial role in SWE-Doctor's fault localization by constructing 'runtime-grounded diagnosis records' that are used together with 'localization information inferred during BRT generation' to guide patch generation. The integration is explicitly mentioned as using these two sources jointly to 'reduce partial patches', but the specific integration mechanism is not detailed in the abstract.
answer.zh: 运行时诊断在SWE-Doctor的故障定位中扮演关键角色，它构建了“基于运行时的诊断记录”，与“BRT生成过程中推断出的定位信息”一起用于指导补丁生成。论文明确提到联合使用这两种来源以“减少局部补丁”，但抽象中未详细说明具体的整合机制。

question.en: Based on SWE-Doctor's evaluation on SWE-bench Verified and SWE-bench Pro, what limitations of these benchmarks become evident, and how might they affect the generalizability of the results to real-world scenarios?
question.zh: 基于SWE-Doctor在SWE-bench Verified和SWE-bench Pro上的评估，这些基准测试的哪些局限性变得明显？它们可能如何影响结果对真实世界场景的泛化能力？

reason.en: The user follows empirical studies and benchmark releases. The paper shows improvements, but critical analysis of benchmarks is valuable. This question probes the realism and limitations.
reason.zh: 用户关注实证研究和基准测试发布。论文展示了改进，但对基准测试的批判性分析很有价值。该问题探究其现实性和局限性。

answer.en: The provided content (abstract and metadata) does not discuss limitations of SWE-bench Verified or SWE-bench Pro. The paper focuses on proposing SWE-Doctor and evaluating its performance, but does not analyze benchmark shortcomings or their effect on generalizability. Therefore, based solely on the given text, no limitations are evident, and any inference about generalizability is speculative.
answer.zh: 所提供的内容（摘要和元数据）未讨论SWE-bench Verified或SWE-bench Pro的局限性。论文专注于提出SWE-Doctor并评估其性能，但未分析基准测试的缺陷或其对泛化能力的影响。因此，仅基于给定文本，没有明显的局限性，任何关于泛化能力的推断都是推测性的。

question.en: How does SWE-Doctor's approach of generating and debugging multiple BRTs compare to classical search-based APR techniques that use test suites for patch validation, and what are the implications for combining LLM-based agents with traditional APR methods?
question.zh: SWE-Doctor生成和调试多个BRT的方法与经典的使用测试套件进行补丁验证的基于搜索的APR技术相比如何？对于将基于LLM的智能体与传统APR方法相结合有何启示？

reason.en: The user is interested in combining classical and LLM-based methods. The paper's method can be seen as a hybrid, and this question explores that connection.
reason.zh: 用户对结合经典方法和基于LLM的方法感兴趣。论文的方法可被视为一种混合方法，该问题探讨了这种联系。

answer.en: SWE-Doctor's approach differs from classical search-based APR that uses test suites solely for patch validation by instead leveraging BRTs as a diagnostic tool. The authors find that "directly using advanced BRT generators to guide patch generation is not beneficial" because fail-to-pass BRTs "may cover only one manifestation... leading to partial patches" and fail-to-fail BRTs are "unreliable as direct patch-generation targets." SWE-Doctor thus "generates multi-faceted BRTs for different behavioral requirements, then executes and debugs these BRTs to construct runtime-grounded diagnosis records" and uses these diagnoses, combined with localization from BRT generation, to guide patch generation. This hybrid approach integrates LLM-based generation with systematic, multi-faceted debugging, moving beyond simple pass/fail validation. The consistent outperformance on SWE-bench suggests that combining LLM agents with traditional APR's diagnostic steps—rather than just test-suite validation—can yield more effective repairs, highlighting the value of augmenting LLMs with runtime analysis.
answer.zh: SWE-Doctor的方法与经典的仅将测试套件用于补丁验证的基于搜索的APR不同，它将BRT用作诊断工具。作者发现，“直接使用高级BRT生成器指导补丁生成并无益处”，因为失败-通过BRT“可能只覆盖一种表现……导致局部补丁”，而失败-失败BRT“作为直接补丁生成目标不可靠”。因此，SWE-Doctor“为不同的行为需求生成多方面的BRT，然后执行并调试这些BRT以构建基于运行时的诊断记录”，并利用这些诊断，结合BRT生成中的定位信息，来指导补丁生成。这种混合方法将基于LLM的生成与系统性的多方面调试相结合，超越了简单的通过/失败验证。在SWE-bench上持续优异的表现表明，将LLM智能体与传统APR的诊断步骤（而非仅测试套件验证）相结合可以产生更有效的修复，突显了使用运行时分析增强LLM的价值。
